title: DecisionRecord
description: Envelope-composed ADR-3 sideways-channel durable record for a resolved decision request.
$comment: The payload preserves daimyo's request + verdict + tier + rationale shape. The durable timestamp is the shared envelope created_at field, using protocol snake_case.

decision_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's DecisionRecord id field.

verdict.description: REQUIRED object. Minimal DecisionVerdict payload returned by decision routing.

tier.description: REQUIRED integer. Daimyo DecisionTier that resolved the request.

rationale.description: REQUIRED string. Durable rationale for the verdict and selected tier.

decisionTier.title: DecisionTier
decisionTier.description: Daimyo-compatible tier that resolved a decision.
